descriptionHtml:
Sly 42 For Sale 2006 | 3 Cabins Version | Tax Paid

If you are looking for a performance cruiser with style, the Sly 42 For Sale 2006 could suit your needs. Designed by Lostuzzi and built by Sly Yachts, this vessel combines functional equipment with practical interiors and respected sailing capability. She is in good condition, updated and maintained across her history. The boat is currently moored in Sicily and registered under the French flag.

Below you will find all the main specifications for this Sly 42 For Sale 2006:

Specifications

  • Shipyard: Sly Yachts
  • Designer: Lostuzzi
  • Year Built: 2006
  • Model: Sly 42
  • Flag: French
  • Registered: Registered
  • CE Class: A
  • Owners: 3
  • Mooring Place: Sicily

Dimensions

  • Length Overall (LOA): 12.80 m
  • Width: 3.80 m
  • Draft: 2.60 m
  • Displacement: 7,700 kg
  • Maximum Persons: 10

Construction & Deck

  • Hull Colour: Grey
  • Hull Material: GRP/carbon
  • Keel: Bulb shape, lead material
  • Carbon rudder shaft
  • Cockpit: Teak, cushions included
  • Sprayhood and Bimini: Yes
  • Cockpit Table: Yes

Interior

  • Cabins: 1 double, 2 with bunk beds/single beds
  • Berths in Saloon: 2
  • Toilets: 2 (one electric)
  • Saloon Cushions: Tempotest beige
  • Beds: Slatted bases
  • Galley: Cooker (3 burners), oven, fridge

Engine & Propulsion

  • Engine Brand/Model: Volvo MD40, 40hp
  • Type: Inboard
  • Year: 2006
  • Hours: 1,500 (updated November 2025)
  • Fuel Tank: 120L
  • Transmission: S-drive
  • Propeller: Gori Racing, 2 folding blades
  • Engine detailed checks and maintenance
  • Steering: wheel

Equipment & Installations

  • Power: 12V/220V
  • Batteries: 5 (4 service x 110Ah, 1 engine x 90Ah, total 530Ah)
  • Water Tanks: 2 (total 400L, PVC)
  • Bilge Pumps: 3
  • Heating: Yes
  • Battery Charger, Water Heater, Fresh Water Tank
  • Outdoor Shower, Black Water Pump

Navigation & Instruments

  • Autopilot: Raymarine
  • VHF: Both inside and outside
  • Tridata and ECO: Garmin
  • Log: Garmin
  • Compass: Yes
  • Stereo: Fusion
  • Plotters: 2 Raymarine (inside and outside)
  • Wind Station: Garmin
  • AIS, Orca navigation (mast tablet)

Sails & Rigging

  • Mast: King carbon
  • Gennaker/Spinnaker Poles: Carbon
  • Rodkicker: Carbon
  • Backstay: Dyneema
  • Jib Furler plus tuff luff forestay

Sails (Cruising)

  • DCX mainsail, DCX jib, storm jib (Dacron), Code 0 on furler

Sails (Racing)

  • Carbon Millenium 2025 mainsail, Jib 1 carbon, Jib 2 Millenium 2025, Jib 3 Eurosail carbon, Jib 4 Dacron, storm jib, A0/A1/A2/A3/A4 gennakers

Safety & Extras

  • Tender: Rigid keel
  • Outboard Engine: 2.3hp
  • Anchor Windlass: Yes
  • Anchor: Kobra 15kg + spare
  • Chain: 90m
  • Mooring Lines: Yes
  • Life Raft: 8-person (exp. 2028)
  • Fenders: 8

The Sly 42 For Sale 2006 offers a balanced package for sailors who value good condition, clear maintenance records, and versatility for both cruising and racing. For further details on this Sly 42 or to arrange a viewing in Sicily, please enquire.
